series_metadata.series_description: Formerly FIS-5 (019-0005). This form prescribed by the State Public Defender (OPD-E-501) is used by counties to report caseloads and obtain reimbursement from the state for county public defender expenditures. The report is submitted each month. Data f

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current fiscal year plus next most recent fiscal year on- site. Remove older records to off-site storage for two years, then destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released., Paper: Shred
